notes: Dataset registry only. No historical World Cup backtest is executed until a clean blind dataset exists.

datasets.purpose: Historical fixtures and results for World Cup backtesting
datasets.notes: Validate schema, license and match dates before use.
Needs cutoff-date filtering to prevent future leakage.

datasets.purpose: Event-level public football data when competition coverage exists
datasets.notes: Use only if competition, match and license coverage are confirmed.

datasets.purpose: Market and result data for compatible football competitions
datasets.notes: Primarily club coverage; international usefulness must be verified.

datasets.purpose: Historical Elo signal for pre-match strength snapshots
datasets.notes: Must use Elo values available before each match date.

datasets.purpose: Official fixtures, results and tournament metadata
datasets.notes: Prefer manual verified snapshots; do not scrape aggressively.

datasets.purpose: User-verified historical odds, lineups, injuries and context
datasets.notes: Use captured_at, source_status and cutoff_date on every snapshot.
